  "findings": [
    "Missing cleanout on the drainage/trap assembly, violating prescriptive plumbing code requirements for maintenance access."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install an approved cleanout fitting (such as a two-way cleanout or a cleanout tee) in accordance with IPC/UPC requirements to allow proper line clearing."
  ],
  "rationale": "Plumbing codes (IPC and UPC) strictly require cleanouts at specific intervals, changes of direction, and near building sewers or traps to allow for maintenance. A missing cleanout on an in-service system is a non-compliant installation that prevents proper clearing of blockages, resulting in a 'fail' decision.",
  "references": [
    "IPC Section 708 (Cleanouts)",
    "UPC Chapter 7 (Sanitary Drainage - Cleanouts)"
  ]
}
